verdict: The chart suffers from technical duplicate exports, highly awkward 'Up-Down' jumps, and forced three-panel brackets that ruin the physical flow for a standard Hard difficulty.

issues.problem: Duplicate JUMP LR events are written at the exact same timestamp, indicating a chart export or parsing bug.
Awkward Up-Down (UD) jumps are used, which are highly uncomfortable and physically unsafe/unbalanced on a standard dance pad.
Forced three-panel bracket steps (tapping U while holding D+R, and tapping D while holding L+R) are too advanced and cramped for a standard Hard chart.
Extremely uncomfortable 16th-note transition directly out of a JUMP DL (DL -> R -> U -> LR) forcing awkward double-steps or high-speed slides.
